title: Enter-to-send fires without compose TextEdit focus
description: In main.rs update(), Enter key detection uses ctx.input() globally — not scoped to when the compose TextEdit widget has focus. Pressing Enter while the chat list or another widget has keyboard focus will silently send whatever text is in compose_text. In egui, ctx.input() is frame-global; the correct guard is to check egui output focus or use TextEdit::layouter/id to detect focus. This is a usability bug: navigating the chat list with keyboard and pressing Enter to select may also trigger a send.
